name: dt-style-guide
description: Dynatrace corporate style guide — vendored terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, and formatting rules, dispatched via dt-style-checker and dt-doc-fixer agents, plus a dt-style-rules skill and three orchestrator commands (dt-style-refresh, dt-review-pr, dt-review-docs). Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter (Vale) is available.
